title: Infosys internal transfer of 90% stake in Infosys Consulting S.R.L., Argentina
detailed_summary: Infosys disclosed an internal reorganization involving transfer of 90% of Infosys Limited’s shareholding in Infosys Consulting S.R.L., Argentina to Infosys Nova Holdings LLC, a wholly owned subsidiary. The Argentina subsidiary contributed USD3.6 Mn revenue and USD -2.0 Mn net-worth as on March 31, 2025. Consideration is stated at ~ USD 0.5 Mn, with expected completion on January 29, 2026.

key_facts.fact: Infosys Nova Holdings LLC approved transfer of 90% of the shareholding held by Infosys Limited in Infosys Consulting S.R.L., Argentina.

Revenue and net-worth of Infosys Consulting S.R.L., Argentina as on March 31, 2025 were Revenue: USD3.6 Mn(0.02% of consolidated revenue of USD 19,277 Mn) and Net-worth: USD -2.0 Mn (-0.02% of consolidated net-worth of USD 11,255 Mn).
key_facts.section_heading: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure) Regulations, 2015

key_facts.fact: The expected date of completion of the sale/disposal is January 29, 2026, and consideration is ~ USD 0.5 Mn.
key_facts.section_heading: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure) Regulations, 2015

financial_metrics.revenue: USD3.6 Mn(0.02% of consolidated revenue of USD 19,277 Mn)

corporate_actions.description: Infosys approved transfer of 90% of the shareholding held by Infosys Limited in Infosys Consulting S.R.L., Argentina, a majority owned subsidiary, to Infosys Nova Holdings LLC, a wholly owned subsidiary of Infosys Limited.
corporate_actions.section_heading: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure) Regulations, 2015

important_text_spans.text: The Board of Infosys Nova Holdings LLC has approved the proposal on November 13, 2025, and the Agreement is yet to be executed.
